notes: Wayback-only companion for the unreachable live afg_aop (issue #15: aop.gov.af takes no TCP from outside AF — dead/offline or geo-fenced). Authored + probe-validated by Claude (authoring role), no full run. IA CDX prefix on aop.gov.af/dr/news_details + /dr/information_details harvests ~2,380 snapshots with the confirmed path-id scheme /dr/news_details/<id> (NOT the ?s=dari&c= query form). Custom Afghan CMS: title from the <title> tag (first line); TEXT via the engine's generic (trafilatura) fallback (recipe selectors miss the custom body; probe recovered 0.8k-26k chars); DATE has no DOM element -> generic/cleaner (likely Solar Hijri / Dari). Harvest includes tender notices ('e'lan-e dawtalabi') -> cleaner's gate rejects. The Dari /dr/ tree is the fullest; an English tree (?s=english&c=news) exists as a possible supplement. Covers the Ghani presidency through the Aug-2021 transition. FULL RUN is the researcher's gate.
